fields.prompt_text: Is this SMS a phishing attempt (smishing)?
fields.body: AIB: A new payee was added to your account today. If this was NOT you, visit https://aib-security-auth.com immediately to cancel.

fields.feedback_text: Correct! This is a smishing (SMS phishing) attempt. Scammers often spoof sender names (like 'AIB Alerts' or 'An Post') and use urgency (unpaid fees, cancelled accounts) to make you click dangerous links. Note the suspicious URL.

fields.prompt_text: Is this SMS a phishing attempt (smishing)?
fields.body: Hi mum, I lost my phone and I'm using a friend's. I need you to pay a bill urgently. WhatsApp me on this number.

fields.feedback_text: Correct! This is the classic 'Hi Mum/Dad' WhatsApp scam. Scammers impersonate a family member in distress from an unknown number to urgently demand money.
